[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000100000 1
6 0000010110 3
7 0010100001 3

01 10 0000000100 1
12 21 0000010101 3
23 32 0010010001 3
34 43 1001010011 5
45 54 0000010010 2
56 65 0010000010 2
67 76 1000000000 1
70 07 0000000100 1

02 20 0000100100 2
13 31 1001010011 5
24 42 0100110001 4
35 53 0010010010 3
46 64 1000100011 4
57 75 0000010100 2
60 06 0000100000 1 match 5
71 17 1001010100 4

03 30 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
14 41 1001010011 5
25 52 0010010100 3
36 63 1010000011 4
47 74 1101010000 4
50 05 0000001100 2
61 16 1000000011 3
72 27 0100010100 3

04 40 0000100000 1 match 5
15 51 0000010110 3 match 6
26 62 0010100001 3 match 7
37 73 1001010000 3
